scripts.analytics:test: pnpm --filter @cap/analytics test && pnpm --filter @cap/web test --run __tests__/unit/product-analytics-browser-token.test.ts __tests__/unit/product-analytics-queue.test.ts __tests__/unit/product-analytics-scheduler.test.ts __tests__/unit/product-analytics-request.test.ts __tests__/unit/product-analytics-transport.test.ts __tests__/unit/product-analytics-server.test.ts __tests__/unit/guest-checkout-analytics.test.ts __tests__/unit/subscription-analytics-webhook.test.ts __tests__/unit/developer-credits-webhook.test.ts && pnpm --dir apps/desktop exec vitest run src/utils/analytics.test.ts src/utils/product-analytics.test.ts && node scripts/analytics/analytics-cli.js test
scripts.dev: pnpm run docker:up && trap 'pnpm run docker:stop' EXIT && dotenv -e .env -- turbo run dev --filter=!@cap/chrome-extension --env-mode=loose --ui tui
scripts.dev:extension: pnpm run docker:up && trap 'pnpm run docker:stop' EXIT && dotenv -e .env -- turbo run dev --filter=@cap/web --filter=@cap/chrome-extension --env-mode=loose --ui tui
scripts.dev:manual: pnpm run docker:up && trap 'pnpm run docker:stop' EXIT && dotenv -e .env -- turbo run dev --filter=!@cap/storybook --filter=!@cap/chrome-extension --no-cache --concurrency 1
scripts.dev:mobile: pnpm run docker:up && trap 'pnpm run docker:stop' EXIT && CAP_MOBILE_DISABLE_ASSOCIATED_DOMAINS=1 EXPO_PUBLIC_CAP_WEB_URL=${EXPO_PUBLIC_CAP_WEB_URL:-http://localhost:3000} dotenv -e .env -- turbo run dev --filter=@cap/web --filter=@cap/mobile --env-mode=loose --ui tui
scripts.dev:windows: start /b cmd /c "pnpm run docker:up > nul" && timeout /t 5 /nobreak > nul && dotenv -e .env -- turbo run dev --filter=!@cap/chrome-extension --env-mode=loose --ui tui
scripts.tauri:build: node scripts/build-desktop-binaries.mjs && dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --dir apps/desktop run preparescript && dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --dir apps/desktop tauri build --verbose
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --dir apps/web exec next typegen && pnpm tsc -b
scripts.test:discover: pnpm with-env cargo run -p cap-test -- discover
scripts.test:matrix: pnpm with-env cargo run -p cap-test -- matrix
scripts.test:matrix:quick: pnpm with-env cargo run -p cap-test -- matrix --quick
scripts.test:matrix:exhaustive: pnpm with-env cargo run -p cap-test -- matrix --exhaustive
scripts.test:synthetic: pnpm with-env cargo run -p cap-test -- synthetic
scripts.test:benchmark: pnpm with-env cargo run -p cap-test -- benchmark
scripts.test:suite:recording: pnpm with-env cargo run -p cap-test -- suite recording
scripts.test:suite:encoding: pnpm with-env cargo run -p cap-test -- suite encoding
scripts.test:suite:playback: pnpm with-env cargo run -p cap-test -- suite playback
scripts.test:suite:sync: pnpm with-env cargo run -p cap-test -- suite sync
scripts.clean: find . -name node_modules -o -name .next -o -name .output -o -name .turbo -o -name dist -type d -prune | xargs rm -rf
